summary: Tested Referral Earnings History page with all advanced features. Backend API returns correct data structure (summary, level_breakdown, top_performers, earnings). All 4 tabs (Overview, Chart, Calendar, Leaderboard) working correctly. Login ID Save (Remember Me) feature working with localStorage persistence.
critical_code_review_comments: API /referral-earnings/{user_id} returns correct structure: earnings array, summary (total_earned, this_month, this_week, today), level_breakdown (L1-L5), top_performers
L2-L5 = 0 is CORRECT behavior - test user only has Level 1 referrals as confirmed by main agent
Top performers show name, level, and estimated earnings based on referral activity
Chart displays 7-day earnings with area chart using recharts library
Calendar tab shows monthly view with earnings per day highlighted
Remember ID feature correctly saves to localStorage on login (saved_login_id, remember_me keys)
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user with referral earnings data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Referral Earnings History page fully functional. Key verified features: 1) Today's Earning Alert shows when today > 0 (green banner) 2) Summary cards show Total Earned, This Month 3) Comparison section shows This Week vs Last Week with % change 4) Monthly Projection shows estimated earnings 5) Four tabs all working - Overview (level breakdown L1-L5), Chart (7-day area chart), Calendar (monthly grid), Leaderboard (top 5 performers) 6) Remember ID on login saves identifier to localStorage and auto-fills on return

tests_performed.backend_api_structure: PASS - /referral-earnings/{user_id} returns earnings, summary, level_breakdown, top_performers
tests_performed.summary_fields: PASS - total_earned, this_month, this_week, today all present and numeric
tests_performed.level_breakdown: PASS - Shows L1-L5 with count and total (L2-L5=0 is correct)
tests_performed.top_performers: PASS - Returns name, level, earnings for each performer
tests_performed.earnings_array: PASS - Contains 30 transaction entries with date, level, prc_earned
tests_performed.frontend_overview_tab: PASS - Shows Earnings by Level with progress bars
tests_performed.frontend_chart_tab: PASS - Shows Last 7 Days Earnings with area chart
tests_performed.frontend_leaderboard_tab: PASS - Shows Top Performing Referrals ranked 1-5
tests_performed.comparison_section: PASS - This Week vs Last Week with +12.7% indicator
tests_performed.remember_id_localstorage: PASS - saved_login_id and remember_me saved to localStorage
tests_performed.remember_id_prefill: PASS - Identifier auto-filled from localStorage on page load
